property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\ProgramData\ComposerSetup in;C:\Users\Estremote\.config\herd in
vm;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\xampp\php;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\VanDyke Software\SecureCRT\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Users\Estremote\.config\herd in;C:\Users\Estremote\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Estremote\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Estremote\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\Estremote\AppData\Roaming\Composer\vendor in;C:\Users\Estremote\AppData\Roaming
